title: Just add Craft!
description:
With the "Just Add Craft!" mod, you can transform your cooking experience by creating powerful, enchanted meals from the "Just add Magic" series that grant incredible abilities! 🍲
But beware...
body:
Just Add Craft! Mod: Bring Magic to Your Minecraft Kitchen 🧙‍♂️🍲

Tired of the same old bread and potatoes? With the "Just Add Craft!" mod, you're not just cooking you're crafting powerful, enchanted meals from the "Just add Magic" series. Forget about plain food and get into a world of magical recipes that offer way more than just filling your hunger bar.

🏆 Top Features
Mystical Recipe Book 📜
Unlock the ancient book filled with enchanted recipes that transform your cooking into a magical experience. From XP boosts to health regeneration, there’s a dish for every need.

Enchanted Food ✨
Cook meals that give you superpowers—run heal instantly, XP-Boosts or even stop time!

 
 
 ⚠️ Warning: Kitchen Chaos!
Magic isn’t always easy to control. If you mix the wrong ingredients there could be some side effects that you really dont want to experience.

 Now get the Mod and start the game lika an protector of the Magic Cookbook!

 -Have Fun

Just Enough Items (JEI) is recommended
